steps.title: Spot the key signal
steps.content: The passage explicitly describes the novel's plot as complicated and its cast as enormous—straightforward markers of intricacy that a brief review cannot fully capture.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content:
These features—enormous cast, complicated structure, backward pagination—collectively define a single quality: the novel's complexity. Complexity directly names what a brief review cannot fully convey.

The other three choices either contradict the passage (inactivity opposes the active, complicated plot; restraint contradicts the elaborate design) or address something not discussed.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
